Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela

Interface VeLaVisitor<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExpressionVisitor, VeLaBaseVisitor
public interface VeLaVisitor<T> extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by VeLaParser.
